---
title: "Catalogo de cursos"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
GitHub Pages
:::

Explora las paginas publicadas, filtra por tema y entra directo al material.
:::

## Cursos

::: {.catalog-panel}
::: {.repo-tools}
<input id="repo-filter" type="search" placeholder="Buscar por titulo o palabra clave" aria-label="Buscar curso">
<a class="repo-source" href="https://github.com/dgonxalex80?tab=repositories">Repositorios en GitHub</a>
:::

<div id="repo-status" class="repo-status">Cargando paginas publicadas...</div>
:::

<div id="repo-grid" class="course-grid" aria-live="polite"></div>

<script>
const githubUser = "dgonxalex80";
const verifiedPages = [
  {
    "name": "backend",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/backend/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "camino",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/camino/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cancionero",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/cancionero/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cocina",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/cocina/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "docker",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/docker/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "LWMMM",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/LWMMM/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "mmm",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/mmm/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "positron",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/positron/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "python",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/python/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "servidor",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/servidor/",
    "has_pages": true
  }
];
const fallbackRepos = [
  {
    "name": "300MAE018B",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/300MAE018B",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "ACEdEstad2021",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/ACEdEstad2021",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad1MET",
    "description": "Actividad 1 Unidad 1 Métodos y Simulación Estadística",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad1MET",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad1MOD",
    "description": "actividad 1 Modelos estadisticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad1MOD",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad1NIV",
    "description": "actividad1 curso nivelatorio de estadistica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad1NIV",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad2MET",
    "description": "Actividad unidad 2 Métodos y Simulación Estadística",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad2MET",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad2NIV",
    "description": "actividad 2 nivelatorio de estadistica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad2NIV",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad3MET",
    "description": "actividad unidad 3 Metodos y simulación Estadística",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad3MET",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad4MOD",
    "description": "actividad 4 Modelos Estadísticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad4MOD",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad5MOD",
    "description": "actividad 5 Modelos Estadísticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad5MOD",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividad6MOD",
    "description": "actividad 6 Modelos Estadísticos para la toma de decisiones ",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividad6MOD",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividades1NIV",
    "description": "actividades nivelatorio de estadistica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividades1NIV",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "actividadST11",
    "description": "actividad 1 series de tiempo",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/actividadST11",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "aplicaciones",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/aplicaciones",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "aulainvertida",
    "description": "presentacion aula invertida",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/aulainvertida",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "backend",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/backend/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "blog_PyE20222",
    "description": "blog probabilidad y estadistica 2022-2",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/blog_PyE20222",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "blogixa",
    "description": "Blog IxaColombia",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/blogixa",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "blogixa2022.io",
    "description": "blog Ixa Colombia ",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/blogixa2022.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "book2",
    "description": "libro de prueba",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/book2",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "book3",
    "description": "book de prueba",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/book3",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "bookPRUEBA",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/bookPRUEBA",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "camino",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/camino/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cancionero",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/cancionero/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "carro",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/carro",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cocina",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/cocina/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "contextoMOD",
    "description": "contextos modelos estadisticos",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/contextoMOD",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "curso1",
    "description": "curso 1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/curso1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "davinci",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/davinci",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "docker",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/docker/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "ejemplo1MOD",
    "description": "Ejemplo 1 Modelos Estadisticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/ejemplo1MOD",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "escuela",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/escuela",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "escuelaR",
    "description": "Recursos de R ",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/escuelaR",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "fifa2026",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/fifa2026",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "futuros_soya",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/futuros_soya",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "gesciti",
    "description": "Gerencia de Sistemas de Ciencia Tecnologia e Innovacion",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/gesciti",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "introduccionPYE",
    "description": "Introduccion PyE",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/introduccionPYE",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "investiga",
    "description": "presentacion investigacion ",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/investiga",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "IXA",
    "description": "documentos IXAcolombia",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/IXA",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "juanca",
    "description": "juanca",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/juanca",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "LWMMM",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/LWMMM/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "metodosySIM1",
    "description": "Metodos y simulacion estadistica - unidad 1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/metodosySIM1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "metodosySIM2",
    "description": "Unidad 2 Metodos y sumulacion estadistica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/metodosySIM2",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "metodosySIM3",
    "description": "Metodos y simulacion estadistica - unidad 3",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/metodosySIM3",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "mmm",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/mmm/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST.io",
    "description": "web modelo estadisticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST1",
    "description": "Modelos estadisticos para la toma de decisiones - unidad 1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST2",
    "description": "Modelos estadisticos para la toma de decisiones - unidad 2",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST2",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST3",
    "description": "unidad 3 Modelos Estadisticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST3",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST4",
    "description": "unidad4 ",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST4",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST5",
    "description": "unidad 2 modelos estadisticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST5",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modelosEST6",
    "description": "unidad 3 modelos estadisticos para la toma de decisiones",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modelosEST6",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modulo0",
    "description": "modulo 0",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modulo0",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "modulo1",
    "description": "modulo 1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/modulo1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "monitorias",
    "description": "monitorias pye",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/monitorias",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "nivelatorioEST",
    "description": "web curso nivelatorio",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/nivelatorioEST",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "nivelatorioEST1",
    "description": "Unidad1 curso nivelatorio de estadistica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/nivelatorioEST1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "positron",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/positron/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "precalculo",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/precalculo",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "presentacion.io",
    "description": "Presentacion trabajo en el cursos de Probabilidad y Estadsitica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/presentacion.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "presentaciones",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/presentaciones",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "probabilidad20212.io",
    "description": "Presentaciones curso de probabilidad y estadística 20212",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/probabilidad20212.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "Probabilidad202301",
    "description": "Curso de PyE 202301",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/Probabilidad202301",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "probabilidad20232",
    "description": "web curso de probabilidad estadistica20232",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/probabilidad20232",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "probabilidad231.io",
    "description": "web curso de probabilidad y estadistica 202301",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/probabilidad231.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "prueba1",
    "description": "trabajo unidad1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/prueba1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "pye20222",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/pye20222",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "python",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/python/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "recurso000",
    "description": "pagina en blanco",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/recurso000",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "seminario",
    "description": "seminario ML",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/seminario",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "seminario1",
    "description": "seminario1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/seminario1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "seminario2",
    "description": "seminario ML",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/seminario2",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "seriesTIE1",
    "description": "Unidad1 curso series de tiempo",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/seriesTIE1",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "servidor",
    "description": "Pagina publicada verificada.",
    "html_url": "",
    "homepage": "https://dgonxalex80.github.io/servidor/",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "sitioJC",
    "description": "sitio de prueba",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/sitioJC",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "sitioweb00520231.io",
    "description": "web pye 20231",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/sitioweb00520231.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "tablero",
    "description": "Tablero actividad académica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/tablero",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "tableroML",
    "description": "tablero ML",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/tableroML",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "tableroSEMINARIO",
    "description": "tablero de prueba seminario",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/tableroSEMINARIO",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "taller101",
    "description": "Taller 1 Probabilidad y Estadistica",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/taller101",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "TeoriaProb202301",
    "description": "Teoría de Probabilidades 2023-01",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/TeoriaProb202301",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "TFoodprice",
    "description": "Tablero Foodprice",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/TFoodprice",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "valora",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/valora",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "web00520231.io",
    "description": "web PyE 202301",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/web00520231.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "web01320231.io",
    "description": "web Teoria de Probabilidades 2023-1",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/web01320231.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "webdgonzalez.io",
    "description": "pagina personal de prueba",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/webdgonzalez.io",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  },
  {
    "name": "webfoodprice",
    "description": "",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/dgonxalex80/webfoodprice",
    "homepage": "",
    "has_pages": true
  }
];

const grid = document.getElementById("repo-grid");
const status = document.getElementById("repo-status");
const filter = document.getElementById("repo-filter");
let repos = [];

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/[&<>"\x27]/g, (char) => ({
    "&": "&amp;",
    "<": "&lt;",
    ">": "&gt;",
    "\"": "&quot;",
    "\x27": "&#39;"
  }[char]));
}

function titleFromName(name) {
  const special = {
    IXA: "IXA",
    LWMMM: "LWMMM",
    TFoodprice: "TFoodprice",
    mmm: "MMM",
    obs: "OBS",
    rstudio: "RStudio",
    vscode: "VSCode",
    fifa2026: "FIFA 2026",
    github: "GitHub",
    davinci: "DaVinci"
  };
  return special[name] || name.replace(/[-_]/g, " " ).replace(/\b\w/g, (letter) => letter.toUpperCase());
}

function pageUrl(repo) {
  if (repo.homepage && /^https?:\/\//.test(repo.homepage)) {
    return repo.homepage;
  }
  if (repo.name === `${githubUser}.github.io`) {
    return `https://${githubUser}.github.io/`;
  }
  return `https://${githubUser}.github.io/${encodeURIComponent(repo.name)}/`;
}

function repoUrl(repo) {
  return repo.html_url || "";
}

function uniqueRepos(items) {
  const byName = new Map();
  items.forEach((repo) => byName.set(repo.name, repo));
  return [...byName.values()].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, "es", { sensitivity: "base" }));
}

function normalizeSearch(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
    .replace(/[-_.]/g, " " )
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim();
}

function searchParts(value) {
  return normalizeSearch(value).split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
}

function repoSearchText(repo) {
  return normalizeSearch(`${titleFromName(repo.name)} ${repo.name} ${repo.description || ""}`);
}

function renderRepos(items) {
  const parts = searchParts(filter.value);
  const visible = items.filter((repo) => {
    const haystack = repoSearchText(repo);
    return parts.every((part) => haystack.includes(part));
  });

  grid.innerHTML = visible.map((repo) => {
    const title = escapeHtml(titleFromName(repo.name));
    const description = repo.description ? `<p>${escapeHtml(repo.description)}</p>` : "";
    const repoLink = repoUrl(repo) ? `<a href="${repoUrl(repo)}">Repositorio</a>` : "";
    return `
      <article class="course-card">
        <h3>${title}</h3>
        ${description}
        <div class="course-actions">
          <a href="${pageUrl(repo)}">Ver pagina</a>
          ${repoLink}
        </div>
      </article>
    `;
  }).join("");

  status.textContent = visible.length === 1
    ? "1 pagina publicada disponible."
    : `${visible.length} paginas publicadas disponibles.`;
}

async function loadRepos() {
  try {
    const data = [];
    for (let page = 1; page <= 10; page += 1) {
      const response = await fetch(`https://api.github.com/users/${githubUser}/repos?per_page=100&page=${page}`);
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error("GitHub no respondio correctamente");
      }
      const batch = await response.json();
      data.push(...batch);
      if (batch.length < 100) {
        break;
      }
    }
    repos = uniqueRepos([
      ...data.filter((repo) => !repo.fork && repo.has_pages),
      ...verifiedPages
    ]);
    renderRepos(repos);
  } catch (error) {
    repos = fallbackRepos;
    renderRepos(repos);
    status.textContent = "No se pudo cargar GitHub en vivo. Mostrando la lista revisada de paginas publicadas.";
  }
}

filter.addEventListener("input", () => renderRepos(repos));
loadRepos();
</script>
